arts.ttl: Jamie McCart’s own-goal double and Butland saves help Rangers past Hearts
arts.sum: The Hearts defender Jamie McCart scored two own goals to help Rangers earn a much-needed 3-1 Scottish Premiership win at Tynecastle. Pressure on the Rangers manager, Philippe Clement, had intensified following the dismal Scottish Cup home defeat to Championship side Queen’s Park last Sunday, but his side got a break in the 20th minute when defender McCart could do little about putting the ball into his own net from Ianis Hagi’s cross. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Has anyone ever scored a hat-trick of own goals? The only players to have topped Jamie McCart's Rangers nightmare
arts.sum: It was a day to forget for Jamie McCart as the Hearts defender twice put the ball into his own net, but things could've been worse

arts.ttl: Jack Butland reveals Rangers selfish streak after admitting he got ‘carried away with trying to help others’

arts.ttl: Jamie McCart suffers double own-goal nightmare as Rangers beat Hearts
arts.sum: The defender’s two moments of misfortune helped Philippe Clements’ side to a much-needed 3-1 win.
